verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.169-170. Brief chapter (7 slokas), all claims accounted for. 5 predictive claims, 5 encoded, 0 gaps.

claims.claim: 8th lord in angle -> long life indicated
8th lord joining ascendant lord or malefic in 8th itself -> short-lived
Saturn and 10th lord similarly affect longevity (10th lord in 8th with malefic -> short life)
6th lord in 12th (or 6th lord in 6th as 12th lord, or 6th+12th lords in 1st+8th) -> long life (Viparita yoga)
5th/8th/ascendant lords in own navamsas/rasis/friendly signs -> long span of life; also lords of 1st/8th/10th + Saturn in angles/trines/11th -> long life
